sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ὀζίας

- Transliteration: Ozias

- Phonetic: od-zee'-as

- Definition: Uzziah = "strength of Jehovah"

1. son of Amaziah, king of Judah from B.C. 810 - 758

- Origin: of hebrew origin H5818

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H5818]; Ozias (that is Uzzijah) an Israelite: - Ozias.
